vocab.example: I rarely opt for designer sneakers because of their exorbitant price tag.
I try to allocate a modest budget for footwear each quarter to avoid overspending.

vocab.meaning: một lần vung tay quá trán/mua sắm xa xỉ
vocab.example: Buying these leather boots was quite a splurge, but their quality justifies the cost.

vocab.meaning: cách tiếp cận tiết kiệm/chi tiêu chừng mực
vocab.example: When it comes to daily sneakers, I maintain a frugal approach and look for discounts.

vocab.meaning: chi phí trên mỗi lần sử dụng (tính kinh tế của món đồ)
vocab.example: I don't mind paying more for quality shoes because the cost-per-wear is actually quite low.
As a keen bargain hunter, I usually wait for end-of-season sales to upgrade my collection.
An extravagant outlay on limited-edition shoes isn't really my cup of tea.
I always ensure that my footwear purchases are strictly within my means.

vocab.meaning: món đồ đáng đầu tư (vì giá trị lâu dài)
vocab.example: I view high-end dress shoes as an investment piece that will last for a decade.

vocab.meaning: thu nhập khả dụng (tiền dư sau thuế và chi phí thiết yếu)
vocab.example: Only a small fraction of my disposable income goes toward buying new shoes.
